title: Chris Long
compiled_truth: Chris Long is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-23 to 2002-01-11), Chris Long sent 62 and received 467 emails, totalling 529 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (36), [Linda Robertson](people/linda-robertson) (33), [Lisa Yoho](people/lisa-yoho) (25), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (18), [Larry Decker](people/larry-decker) (15). Mailbox folders observed: aadepartment, cftc, deleted_items, federal_legis_, retail_markets, sec.
